buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.name: Krakucchanda
buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.qualities: The first Buddha of the Bhadrakalpa. Overcame the afflictions of the early age.

buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.name: Kanakamuni
buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.qualities: The second Buddha. Golden sage who taught the perfection of giving.

buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.name: Kasyapa
buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.qualities: The third Buddha. Taught pure discipline and luminous awareness.

buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.name: Shakyamuni
buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.qualities: The fourth Buddha. The historical Buddha who taught the Middle Way and the Four Noble Truths.

buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.name: Maitreya
buddhas_of_the_fortunate_eon.qualities: The fifth and future Buddha. The embodiment of loving-kindness (Maitri).

arya_sanghata_sutra.description: A deeply transformative Mahayana sutra. Hearing it cleanses eons of negative karma and aligns the listener with the Bodhisattva path.
themes: The nature of arising and passing

sutra_of_golden_light.description: A sutra focused on the protection of nations, the confession of faults, and the profound nature of emptiness.

key_figures.name: Sarasvati
key_figures.role: Goddess of eloquence, memory, and wisdom.

key_figures.name: Sri (Lakshmi)
key_figures.role: Goddess of wealth, prosperity, and merit.

key_figures.name: Drdha
key_figures.role: Earth Goddess who sustains the land.

key_figures.name: The Four Heavenly Kings
key_figures.role: Protectors of the dharma in the four directions.

yidams_and_mantras.name: Chenrezig (Avalokiteshvara)
yidams_and_mantras.purpose: To awaken compassion and heal the heart.

yidams_and_mantras.name: Green Tara
yidams_and_mantras.description: The mother of all Buddhas, swiftly acting to remove fear and obstacles.
yidams_and_mantras.purpose: Victory from difficulty, swift protection, overcoming fear.

yidams_and_mantras.name: Medicine Buddha (Bhaisajyaguru)
yidams_and_mantras.description: The supreme healer whose lapis lazuli light cures all physical and mental illnesses.
yidams_and_mantras.dharani_mantra: Tayata Om Bekandze Bekandze Maha Bekandze Radza Samudgate Soha

yidams_and_mantras.name: Vajrasattva
yidams_and_mantras.description: The principle of purity, used for clearing karmic obscurations.
yidams_and_mantras.dharani_mantra: Om Vajrasattva Samaya Manu Palaya... (100 Syllable Mantra)

yidams_and_mantras.name: Manjushri
yidams_and_mantras.dharani_mantra: Om Ah Ra Pa Tsa Na Dhi
yidams_and_mantras.purpose: Cutting through delusion, gaining profound insight.
